evidence: Direct regression test ActiveFeatureProof_ReValidatesAgainstItsOwnReleaseCommit_NotLiveHead: re-plan bounded to the feature's release commit has NO planner-hash drift; re-plan against live HEAD (pre-fix) DOES drift — confirmed by reverting the bound (test fails) and restoring (test passes). Integration dogfood: with the fix + a clean tree, 'hx release --patch' succeeded — 'Release speckit-doti 0.14.1 tagged v0.14.1' with feature 022 staying valid (the exact bug scenario). 60 cycle/release-train tests green.
